system.description: The Fair have gifted you with an arcane firearm. Works as a normal ranged weapon without being activated.

upgrades.name: Explosive
upgrades.description: Your ranged attacks gain: Special: apply an extra individual hit to another target in the vicinity.

upgrades.name: Homing
upgrades.description: Your ranged attacks gain: Special: this individual hit—not the whole attack—bypasses Guard.

upgrades.name: Trick Shooting
upgrades.description: The Gun can fire precisely enough to act as a form of telekinesis: you can knock on windows, ring doorbells, open doors and perform other feats of accuracy.

upgrades.name: Tracking
upgrades.description: Its attacks gain Special: the target can be reliably traced for 24 hours.

upgrades.name: Sniper
upgrades.description: You can shoot as far as you can see.

upgrades.name: Sentry Gun
upgrades.description: The gun can be left behind to guard a stationary position, and obey a simple set of orders. When it's next activated, it instantly appears in the Neo's hands.
